install_fields.label: Auth Token
install_fields.help: Your Sentry Auth Token with issues:read, project:read, and release:read scopes.

install_fields.label: Organization Slug
install_fields.help: The slug of your Sentry organization (e.g. my-org). Find it in Settings > General Settings.

install_fields.label: Sentry URL (default: https://sentry.io)
install_fields.help: Leave blank for Sentry Cloud. For self-hosted Sentry, enter your instance URL (e.g. https://sentry.mycompany.com).

description: Syncs Sentry issues, projects, releases, and issue events into the Shielva knowledge base for AI-powered error analysis and incident response.
